dsl_rule.translation_notes: Classic Golden Cross / Death Cross strategy. Uses SMA(50) and SMA(200) as specified in parameters. Direction is context-dependent: long when short-term MA > long-term MA, short otherwise. Exit conditions are reversals of entry conditions as per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Classic Golden Cross / Death Cross strategy. Uses SMA(50) and SMA(200) as specified in parameters. Direction is context-dependent: long when short-term MA > long-term MA, short otherwise. Exit conditions are reversals of entry conditions as per signal specification.

source_rule_text: A trader should hold a long position when short-term moving average exceeds long-term moving average, and hold a short position otherwise, using optimized lookback periods for both averages.
